heading: Use of appropriated funds for operation of Armed Forces Recreation Center, Europe: limitation
label: 2491b Use of appropriated funds for operation of Armed Forces Recreation Center, Europe: limitation
notes: Amendments2004— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 108–375section 2247 of this title1997—Subsec. (b). substituted “the maintenance, repair, or renovation of real property, and the transportation” for “real property maintenance, and transportation”.Pub. L. 105–85
amendments: Amendments2004— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 108–375section 2247 of this title1997—Subsec. (b). substituted “the maintenance, repair, or renovation of real property, and the transportation” for “real property maintenance, and transportation”.Pub. L. 105–85

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: a .—Limitation
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), funds appropriated to the Department of Defense may not be used to operate the Armed Forces Recreation Center, Europe.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to the use of funds for the payment of utilities, the maintenance, repair, or renovation of real property, and the transportation of products made in the United States.
